Wali.title: Wali Profile and Student Progress Sync Document
Wali.description: Represents the static parent profile syncing progress and settings of their children.

students.description: Map of nested children profiles keyed by child ID.

Child.title: Child Profile with Adaptive History Document
Child.description: Structure tracking individual child adaptive memorization history state metrics.

memory_history.description: Keys mapped to Surah names, storing current_verse_range, consecutive_stuck_days, retention_score, and next_review_interval.

DailyLog.title: Daily Recitation Log Entry
DailyLog.description: Chronological history record tracking single day recitation feedback session metrics.

/walis/{waliId}.description: Collection of parents/groups that manage multiple kids' profiles in a secure, single-document structure.

/children/{childId}.description: Collection storing adaptive student memory maps dynamically.

/daily_logs/{logId}.description: Chronological record storage schema for logging daily sessions.
